tagline: A sun-soaked celebration by the sea with our favourite people in one unforgettable place.
announcement: We are so excited to celebrate in Greece. You will find the key details for the wedding weekend here.

story.heading: Our Story
paragraphs: We met, laughed easily from the start, and somehow every ordinary day together kept turning into something special.
Over time, weekends away turned into bigger adventures, family dinners became traditions, and our plans slowly started to look like a life.
Now we cannot wait to gather everyone we love in Greece and celebrate this next chapter together.

ceremony.title: Ceremony
ceremony.description: Guests are invited to arrive from 4:00 PM to enjoy a relaxed arrival before the ceremony begins.

reception.title: Reception
reception.description: Drinks, dinner, sunset views, speeches, and dancing into the evening.

schedule.title: Guest Arrival
schedule.details: Guests begin arriving at the venue and are shown to their seats.

schedule.title: Ceremony Begins
schedule.details: Our ceremony begins overlooking the caldera.

schedule.title: Drinks & Photos
schedule.details: Cocktails, canapes, and a little time to soak in the view.

schedule.title: Dinner
schedule.details: Dinner is served on the terrace as the sun sets.

schedule.title: Speeches
schedule.details: A few words before the evening party begins.

schedule.title: Dancing
schedule.details: Music, dancing, and a long warm night with everyone together.

travel.heading: Venue & Travel
travel.description: Everything guests need to find the venue, get around easily, and settle into the wedding weekend without over-planning.
travel.relaxedNote: Greek weddings often run on a more relaxed rhythm, so please give yourself a little breathing room and enjoy the island pace rather than rushing from place to place.

mapSpots.label: Airport
mapSpots.detail: Santorini Airport for arrivals, transfers, and taxi pickup.

mapSpots.label: Venue
mapSpots.detail: Santorini Gem for the ceremony, drinks, dinner, and dancing.

mapSpots.label: Suggested Hotels
mapSpots.detail: Fira and nearby areas are the easiest bases for transport and dining.

mapSpots.label: Old Town
mapSpots.detail: Pyrgos village and the surrounding lanes are perfect for a slow wander before or after the wedding.

travel.transport: We recommend arranging transfers or taxis in advance, as Santorini can be busy around wedding season.
travel.parking: Limited parking is available near the venue, so shared transport is encouraged where possible.
travel.directions: Pyrgos is centrally located on the island and around 15 minutes by car from Fira and nearby accommodation areas.

accommodation.name: El Greco Resort
accommodation.note: A popular base near Fira with easy access to wedding transport and island transfers.

accommodation.name: Aressana Spa Hotel & Suites
accommodation.note: A central Fira option for guests wanting to stay close to restaurants and nightlife.

faq.q: Can I bring a plus one?
faq.a: Only if named on the invitation.
The dress code is elegant summer wedding attire. Please keep the warm weather and uneven paths in mind when choosing shoes.

faq.q: Do we need to arrange transport?
faq.a: Yes, we recommend pre-booking taxis or transfers, especially for the journey back later in the evening.
Yes, much of the day will be outdoors, so sunglasses, light layers, and comfortable footwear are a good idea.

rsvp.label: Contact Jo & Mike
rsvp.description: If your travel plans change or you need anything before the wedding, please get in touch directly.

gallery.heading: A Few Favourite Moments
gallery.description: A little glimpse of us before we celebrate in Santorini.

registry.message: Your presence in Greece is more than enough, and we are simply excited to celebrate with you.

contact.note: If you cannot find what you need here, please send us an email and we will point you in the right direction.
